title: bus.tengine.agent.thought v1
description: When: An agent emits its first user-visible thought sentence at the start of a new block of work. Source: /tengine. Emitted by the orchestrator so consumers can stream real-time agent cognition and detect reasoning patterns or anomalies.

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

agent_name.description: Name of the agent that produced this thought sentence.

bead_id.description: Bead identifier this thought is associated with.

sentence.description: The first sentence of the agent's user-visible block; represents the high-level intent or observation for this step.

timestamp.description: ISO8601/RFC3339 timestamp when the agent emitted this thought, generated by the emitter at the time of capture.
